Description: Minimize unnecessary widget rebuilds by using const constructors and selective rebuilds
Do: Use const constructors; extract widgets into separate classes; use selective state management
Dont: Rebuild entire widget tree on every state change
Code Bad: setState(() { /* changes one field but rebuilds everything */ });\n// No const constructors anywhere
Measurement: Flutter DevTools > Performance overlay; watch rebuild counts

Description: Use lazy-loading ListView.builder instead of ListView with children for large lists
Do: Use ListView.builder/separated for dynamic lists; set itemExtent when possible; use const item widgets
Dont: Use ListView(children: [...]) with hundreds of items
Measurement: Scrolling jank visible in Performance overlay; frame times > 16ms

Description: Optimize image loading with proper caching resizing and format selection
Do: Use cached_network_image; resize to display size; use WebP format; implement placeholder/error widgets
Dont: Load full-resolution images; no caching; no placeholders
Code Good:
CachedNetworkImage(
  imageUrl: product.imageUrl,
  memoryLimit: 300, // KB
  maxWidthDiskCache: 400,
  placeholder: (context, url) => const ShimmerPlaceholder(),
  errorWidget: (context, url, error) => const Icon(Icons.broken_image),
  fadeInDuration: const Duration(milliseconds: 200),
)
Measurement: Memory usage in DevTools; image decode time in timeline

Description: Properly dispose controllers streams and subscriptions to prevent memory leaks
Do: Cancel stream subscriptions in dispose; use autoDispose with Riverpod; close StreamControllers
Dont: Keep stream subscriptions alive after widget disposal
Measurement: Flutter DevTools > Memory tab; watch for increasing memory over time

Description: Minimize network calls with caching debouncing and request batching
Do: Cache API responses; debounce search queries; batch related requests; use ETags
Dont: Make duplicate API calls; no debouncing on search input
Measurement: Network tab in DevTools; count API calls during search

Description: Minimize cold start time by deferring non-critical initialization
Do: Defer heavy initialization; use lazy singletons; load essentials first; show splash during init
Dont: Initialize everything synchronously in main(); load all data before showing UI
Measurement: Time from launch to first frame; Dart DevTools timeline

Description: Keep animations at 60fps by using hardware-accelerated properties
Do: Animate transform and opacity (GPU-composited); use RepaintBoundary; avoid animating layout properties
Dont: Animate size/padding/margin (triggers layout); rebuild complex widgets per frame
Measurement: Performance overlay; frame rendering times; GPU thread usage

Description: Optimize local database operations with batching and proper indexing
Do: Use batch operations; add indexes on queried columns; use transactions for multiple writes
Dont: Write records one-by-one in a loop; query without indexes
Measurement: Database query time; I/O in DevTools timeline

Description: Minimize app download size for better install rates
Do: Enable tree shaking; compress assets; use deferred imports; split debug symbols; use --split-per-abi
Dont: Bundle unnecessary assets; include debug symbols in release; use uncompressed images
Code Good:
# Flutter build optimizations
flutter build apk --split-per-abi --obfuscate --split-debug-info=debug-info/
flutter build appbundle --obfuscate --split-debug-info=debug-info/

# Analyze size
flutter build apk --analyze-size
Code Bad: flutter build apk\n# Single fat APK with all ABIs = 3x larger than needed\n# No obfuscation, debug symbols included
Measurement: APK Analyzer in Android Studio; flutter build --analyze-size

Description: Move CPU-intensive work to isolates to keep UI thread responsive
Do: Use compute() for JSON parsing of large payloads; use isolates for image processing
Dont: Parse large JSON on main thread; process images synchronously on UI thread
Measurement: UI jank during data loading; DevTools CPU profiler

Description: Minimize battery drain by reducing background work and location polling
Do: Use WorkManager for periodic tasks; reduce location accuracy when possible; batch network requests
Dont: Poll server every few seconds; keep GPS at highest accuracy always; prevent screen sleep unnecessarily
Measurement: Battery usage in OS settings; background execution time

Description: Properly manage navigation stack to prevent memory buildup
Do: Use pushReplacement for auth flows; popUntil for deep returns; clear stack on logout
Dont: Push screens indefinitely without ever popping; keep screens in memory after logout
Code Bad: Navigator.push(context, MaterialPageRoute(builder: (_) => HomeScreen()));\n// After login, login screen still in stack\n// User can press back to return to login
Measurement: Route count in Navigator; memory usage after navigation

Description: Prevent unnecessary rebuilds by selecting specific state slices
Do: Use context.select() or ref.watch with select; use Equatable for BLoC states; use distinct streams
Dont: Watch entire state object when only one field is needed
Measurement: Rebuild count in DevTools; unnecessary build method calls

Description: Optimize native bridge calls to minimize serialization overhead
Do: Batch platform channel calls; use BasicMessageChannel for streams; minimize data transfer size
Dont: Make separate platform calls for each small piece of data; transfer large objects across bridge
Measurement: Platform channel call count; serialization time

Description: Optimize build configuration for each environment
Do: Use build flavors for dev/staging/prod; enable R8/ProGuard for Android release; strip debug code
Dont: Use debug configuration in production; disable optimizations for faster builds
Code Bad:
# Same build for all environments
flutter build apk
# Debug logging and dev API in production
# No code shrinking
Measurement: APK/IPA size; startup time; presence of debug features in release
